title: Stablecoin Rulemaking Comments Expose Payments Industry Fault Lines
message_html: Stablecoin Rulemaking Comments Expose Payments Industry Fault Lines ...
snippet: As regulation moves from proposal to final rules etched in stone, comment letters give a sense of where frictions and consensus are taking shape.
